title: CD Projekt Red executives talk about AI, trust, and industry competition
summary: The executives of the Polish studio speak about the arrival of AI-generated games, the loss of player trust after Cyberpunk 2077, and their strategy to avoid controversies like those of Ubisoft and Activision.

title: Grand Theft Auto news: expectations for GTA 6, government promotion, and a rural GTA 4 mod
summary: The hype for the GTA 6 trailer mixes with price rumors, the British government encourages playing GTA Online, and a mod transforms Liberty City into a Wisconsin town.

summary: The French executive, brother of the company's founders, lost his life in an aircraft accident.
